title: RDL Limit Stability: GL_3 Attack — Extending GRH

ramanujan.gl2_holomorphic: Ramanujan for GL_2 holomorphic: PROVEN (Deligne 1974, Weil conjectures)
ramanujan.gl2_maass: Ramanujan for GL_2 Maass: OPEN (Selberg 1/4 conjecture: λ₁≥1/4)

gl3.target: Full Ramanujan: |a_p|≤p^{(3-1)/2}=p^1 (or more precisely p^0 for normalized)

ramanujan.gl4_beyond: GL_n (n≥4): even weaker bounds; full Ramanujan fully open

partial_ecl.object: Partial ECL for GL_3 using Kim-Sarnak bounds

partial_ecl.upper_bound: ET(L(s))≤3 (T106 tropical sandwich: no natural EML-4 object)
partial_ecl.lower_bound_partial: ET(L(s))≥3 — partial: oscillations p^{it·5/14} are sub-unitary but nonzero
partial_ecl.gap: Full ET≥3 requires full Ramanujan (|a_p|=1); Kim-Sarnak gives partial
partial_ecl.conclusion: ET(L_GL3(s)) = 3 IF ET≥3 lower bound holds (which requires full Ramanujan)

partial_ecl.conditional_theorem: T119a (S396): ECL for GL_3 conditional on Selberg 1/4 + Ramanujan GL_3
partial_ecl.new_theorem: T119: GL_3 Conditional ECL (S396): ET(L_GL3)=3 conditional on Ramanujan GL_3

functoriality.object: GL_3 Ramanujan via Langlands functoriality from GL_2

strategy.step2: Ramanujan for GL_3 Sym²(GL_2): follows from Deligne via functoriality
strategy.step3: General GL_3: reduce to Sym² via strong functoriality (Langlands)
strategy.status: Sym² case: PROVEN; general GL_3: conditional on strong functoriality

eml_reading.functoriality: Langlands transfer: EML depth preserved (LUC instance #26?)
eml_reading.prediction: ECL for all Sym^n lifts: proven by induction if functoriality holds

functoriality.cascade: Sym² lift → GL_3 Ramanujan → ECL GL_3 → GRH GL_3

verdicts.ramanujan: GL_3 Ramanujan: OPEN; best bound 5/14 (Kim-Sarnak); target 0
verdicts.partial_ecl: T119: ECL GL_3 conditional on Ramanujan GL_3
verdicts.functoriality: Sym² route: partial progress; strong functoriality needed

key_theorem: GL_3 Conditional ECL (T119, S396): Ramanujan status: GL_1 trivial, GL_2/Q proven (Deligne), GL_3 open (best: 5/14, Kim-Sarnak 2003). ECL for GL_3: ET(L_GL3)=3 CONDITIONAL on full Ramanujan GL_3. Strategy: Sym² lift (Gelbart-Jacquet) + Langlands functoriality → GL_3 Ramanujan from GL_2. Sym²(GL_2): proven; general GL_3: conditional on strong functoriality. EML prediction: Sym^n lifts preserve depth; ECL holds for all Sym^n if functoriality holds. GRH roadmap: GL_n ECL ← Ramanujan GL_n ← Langlands functoriality.
rabbit_hole_log: GL_3 Ramanujan: open; Kim-Sarnak best bound 5/14 vs target 0
Partial ECL GL_3: ET≤3 proven, ET≥3 conditional on Ramanujan
Sym² route: GL_2→GL_3 via Gelbart-Jacquet; proven for Sym²
EML prediction: Sym^n preserves depth; LUC instance #26 candidate
NEW: T119 GL_3 Conditional ECL — conditional on Ramanujan GL_3
